sourceMovie.title: Red Sparrow
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: People revisit Red Sparrow for the same reason it broke through in 2018: clear stakes, memorable faces, and a mystery rhythm that doesn't stall in the middle. Francis Lawrence keeps the ensemble pointed in one direction. The thriller and mystery blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: Salt
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Red Sparrow clicked for you, Salt (2010) is a strong next stop: both trade in thriller and mystery, with momentum and clean stakes. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Red Sparrow?
faq.answer: Try Salt, Three Days of the Condor, Dressed to Kill—each shares DNA with Red Sparrow while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Red Sparrow?
faq.answer: Red Sparrow (2018) is best described as Thriller, Mystery. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Red Sparrow worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 6.5/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this thriller lane.
